title: Clear task filter result summary copy
description: Improve the Tasks filter bar result summary so empty and partial matches are easier to understand, with a tested helper for pluralization and zero-match states.

title: Task filter controls accessibility labels
description: Add explicit aria labels and button types to compact Tasks toolbar controls that currently rely on icon/title-only affordances.

title: Focused Vitest collection baseline cleanup
description: Exclude Playwright e2e specs and Odysseus TAP files from the unit-test runner so pnpm test reports source regressions instead of environment collection noise.

title: Task filter empty-state action hint
description: When filters hide every task, show a small inline hint near the board with a one-click clear-filters action rather than only the compact toolbar summary.
